G

generateCompleteURL(String) - Static method in class tech.asmussen.dvi.api.API
Generates a complete URL based on the API.URL.
generateConnection(HttpURLConnection, String) - Static method in class tech.asmussen.dvi.api.API
Generates a connection to the web server.
getCurrentTime() - Static method in class tech.asmussen.util.Uptime
Get the current time in milliseconds.
getHumidity() - Static method in class tech.asmussen.dvi.api.Outside
Get the humidity from outside the building.
getHumidity() - Static method in class tech.asmussen.dvi.api.Storage
Get the humidity of the building.
getItemsOverMaximum() - Static method in class tech.asmussen.dvi.api.Storage
Get all items that are over maximum stock and needs to be sold.
getItemsUnderMinimum() - Static method in class tech.asmussen.dvi.api.Storage
Get all items that are under minimum stock and needs to be ordered.
getMostSoldItems() - Static method in class tech.asmussen.dvi.api.Storage
Get an array list of the items that are most sold.
getNews() - Method in class tech.asmussen.dvi.api.News
Get the latest news from the News.NEWS_SOURCE and add it to the News.NEWS_CACHE if it isn't already there.
getTemperature() - Static method in class tech.asmussen.dvi.api.Outside
Get the temperature from outside the location.
getTemperature() - Static method in class tech.asmussen.dvi.api.Storage
Get the temperature from the storage location.
getTime(String) - Static method in class tech.asmussen.dvi.core.DVI
Returns the current time in the format HH:mm:ss dd-MM-yyyy.
